contentBlocks.title: When do you need to convert meters to feet?
contentBlocks.html:
Meter (m) is the base unit of length in the metric system. Foot (ft) is the standard length unit in the imperial system. The conversion factor is: 1 m = 3.28084 feet, or 1 foot = 0.3048 m exactly.

Converting meters to feet is essential for height (US medical forms use feet/inches), construction and real estate (US property dimensions), aviation (altitude in feet), and sports (field dimensions).

Height examples: 1.70 m = 5'7″, 1.80 m = 5'11″, 1.90 m = 6'3″. Room height: 2.5 m = 8.2 ft.

All calculations run locally in your browser — nothing is sent to any server.

items.description: Type a number in the input field. You can use a period or comma as the decimal separator.

items.title: 2. Read the result

items.title: 3. Copy or reverse
items.description: Click Copy result or use the Reverse button to convert in the opposite direction.

contentBlocks.title: How does meters to feet conversion work?
contentBlocks.html:
The international foot is defined as exactly 0.3048 meters. Therefore, 1 meter = 1/0.3048 = 3.28084 feet.

To convert meters to feet, multiply by 3.28084. To convert feet to meters, multiply by 0.3048.

To convert to feet and inches: multiply meters by 3.28084, take the whole number as feet, multiply the decimal by 12 for inches. Example: 1.75 m = 5.741 ft = 5 ft 8.9 in ≈ 5'9″.

contentBlocks.title: Practical tips
contentBlocks.html:
• Height: 1.60 m = 5'3″, 1.70 m = 5'7″, 1.80 m = 5'11″, 1.90 m = 6'3″, 2.00 m = 6'7″.
  • Room: ceiling height 2.4 m = 7.9 ft, 2.7 m = 8.9 ft, 3.0 m = 9.8 ft.
  • 1 yard = 3 feet = 0.9144 m. 1 fathom = 6 feet = 1.8288 m.
  • Mount Everest: 8,849 m = 29,032 ft. Burj Khalifa: 828 m = 2,717 ft.

items.question: How many feet is 1 meter?
items.answer: 1 meter = 3.28084 feet. Approximately 1 meter is a bit more than 3 feet 3 inches.

items.question: How do I convert meters to feet and inches?
items.answer: Multiply meters by 3.28084. The whole number is feet. Multiply the decimal by 12 for inches. Example: 1.80 m = 5.906 ft = 5 ft 10.87 in ≈ 5'11″.

items.question: What is 6 feet in meters?
items.answer: 6 feet = 1.8288 meters. This is a common height conversion for US medical forms.

items.question: How tall is 1.80 m in feet?
items.answer: 1.80 m = 5 feet 10.87 inches, commonly rounded to 5'11″.

items.question: Why does aviation use feet?
items.answer: The International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) standardized altitude in feet for global consistency. Most countries use feet for altitude even if they use metric otherwise.

items.question: Are calculations done locally?
items.answer: Yes. All calculations run in your browser. No data is sent to any server.
